zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Martyn於1574年12月8日出生在英國戴文拉特利時，她的父親Robert Martyn30歲，母親Joane Harris36歲。她於1590年與Richard Marche在英國戴文黑福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年5月23日在英國戴文黑福德享年41歲，埋葬在英國戴文黑福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Martyn于1574年12月8日出生在英国戴文拉特利时，她的父亲Robert Martyn30岁，母亲Joane Harris36岁。她于1590年与Richard Marche在英国戴文黑福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1616年5月23日在英国戴文黑福德享年41岁，埋葬在英国戴文黑福德。

nameMeanings.name: Martyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Martin   1.
Polish and Ukrainian: from the personal name Martyn (see Martin ).
Americanized and Flemish form of Dutch Martijn: variant of Martin 1.

variants.name: Martinkus
meanings: Lithuanian: adaptation of Polish Martynko, from a derivative of the personal name Martyn ‘Martin’.

variants.name: Martyniuk
meanings: Polish: patronymic from the personal name   Martyn  .

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Martyn was born on 8 December 1574, in Rattery, Devon, England, her father, Robert Martyn, was 30 and her mother, Joane Harris, was 36. She married Richard Marche in 1590, in Sherford, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died on 23 May 1616, in Sherford, Devon, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Sherford, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Martyn est née le 8 décembre 1574, à Rattery, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert Martyn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joane Harris, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Marche en 1590, à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 mai 1616, à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Martyn am 8. Dezember 1574 in Rattery, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Martyn 30 und ihre Mutter Joane Harris 36. Sie hat 1590 in Sherford, Devon, England Richard Marche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Mai 1616 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Sherford, Devon, England und wurde in Sherford, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Martyn è nata il il 8 dicembre 1574 nel Rattery, Devon, England, sua padre, Robert Martyn, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joane Harris, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Richard Marche nel 1590, nel Sherford, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1616, nel Sherford, Devon, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Sherford, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Martynが1574年12月8日にイギリスデボンラッテリーで生まれた時，父Robert Martynは30歳，母Joane Harrisは36歳であった。1590年にイギリスデボンシェルフォードでRichard Marcheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年5月23日にイギリスデボンシェルフォードで41歳で死去し，イギリスデボンシェルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Martyn(이)가 1574년 12월 8일 영국 데폰 래터이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Martyn(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Harris(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1590년 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에서 Richard Marche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 5월 23일 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.8 December 1574–23 May 1616: 8 de dezembro de 1574–23 de maio de 1616
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Martyn nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1574, em Rattery, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Martyn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joane Harris, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Marche em 1590, em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1616, em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Martyn родилась 8 декабря 1574 г. в местности раттири, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Martyn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Harris, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Marche в 1590 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 23 мая 1616 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия.

es.8 December 1574–23 May 1616: 8 de diciembre de 1574–23 de mayo de 1616
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Martyn nació el 8 de diciembre de 1574, en Rattery, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Martyn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joane Harris, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Richard Marche en 1590, en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1616, en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra.
